goods_description.invoice_value: Description lines totaling 82 Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER
goods_description.motivation: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' present in invoice lines and total unit count sums to 82 Reels (rule 4.3.3).

quantity.motivation: Exact match of numerical quantity 247.133 MT between certificate box 7 and invoice 'Total Weight Quantity' (rule 4.4.1).

origin.motivation: Origin 'Slovakia' explicitly appears in invoice 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field (rule 4.5.4.2).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points MATCH; certificate and invoice data are fully consistent.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
